questions.question: Does the robot arm make unintended contact with the workpiece, gantry frame, or structural hardware (collision)?
Does any component (panel tile, fastener, bracket) fall or get dropped during assembly?
What type of collision or drop occurred?
options: A. Robot arm hit a structural element
B. End-effector collided with the panel surface
C. Component dropped from the arm
D. Component fell from the assembly

questions.question: What best describes the overall lighting level in the assembly cell?
Does the robot arm exhibit abnormal movement (jerking, freezing, unexpected trajectory)?
Is any component visibly misaligned or incorrectly positioned on the assembly?
Is a human hand, arm, or body visible inside the robot's active workspace?
What is the robot arm currently doing?
options: B. Repositioning or moving between tasks

questions.question: Is the robot arm's end-effector in contact with the workpiece?
Are panel tiles or components visibly being added to the assembly in this segment?
